expectations.text: Flags the underscore and capital in 'My_SQLHelper' as a naming violation
expectations.evidence: skill-making has no review workflow and no naming rules. It mentions kebab-case nowhere; create_skill.py actively uses snake_case.

expectations.text: Flags the description as too vague / missing negative trigger
expectations.evidence: No description field quality guidance exists anywhere in skill-making SKILL.md.

expectations.text: Flags that instructions are not numbered or actionable
expectations.evidence: No instruction quality criteria in skill-making.

expectations.text: Flags missing or incomplete metadata fields (author, category, tags)
expectations.evidence: skill-making's SKILL.md template includes metadata with author, version, category, tags — so the skill is aware of these fields, though no explicit review checklist exists to flag their absence.
skill-making's own CHANGELOG.md exists but create_skill.py does not produce one, and there is no review checklist.

expectations.text: Provides a verdict or summary judgment (not just a list of issues)
expectations.evidence: No review workflow exists to produce a verdict.
